reviews.comment:
Excelente todo. El bar atiende de 8 a 20. Playa 24hs. Sándwich de jamón crudo en pan de miga ENORME a $5200.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was excellent. The bar is open from 8 am to 8 pm. Beach is open 24 hours. A huge prosciutto sandwich on white bread costs $5200.

reviews.comment:
Por ser una estación de servicio de bandera. La única en 200 km a la redonda. Perteneciente al ACA. No entiendo como no tienen previsto un generador para poder brindar el servicio, estando en zona de vientos fuertes, viento sonda, con las grandes posibilidades de cortes de luz de hasta 3 días como nos comentaba un vecino del lugar

(Translated by Google)
Because it's a branded service station. The only one within a 200 km radius. Belonging to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). I don't understand why they don't have a generator to provide service, being in an area of ​​strong winds, with the high probability of power outages lasting up to 3 days, as a local resident told us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyZ1BicUpnEAE
